LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CARTER'S RETAIL, INC.'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION IS DENIED. WHEN THE ACTION WAS COMMENCED, DEFENDANT WAS A FOREIGN CORPORATION THAT HAD NOT DESIGNATED A PRINCIPAL PLACE OF BUSINESS ANYWHERE IN CALIFORNIA. THE COURT ADDS: RESPONSE PLEADING IS DUE WITHIN TEN DAYS FROM TODAY. COUNSEL WAIVE NOTICE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Change Of Venue
Off Calendar Apr-08-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CARTER'S RETAIL, INC.'S Motion for Change of Venue. Appearances: Jade Butman, Esq. of Keller Grover LLP (415) 543-1305, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Derek H. Lim, Esq. of Burnham Brown (510) 444-6800, appearing for Defendant and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is denied. When the action was commenced, defendant was a foreign corporation that had not designated a principal place of business anywhere in California. The Court adds: Response pleading is due within ten days from today. Counsel waive notice. Order signed in open Court (302CWW/VC)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
